violations.text: Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Trays of Monkee Ballz and peeled bananas observed uncovered in freezer. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. Pan liners were placed over food during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (blender bowls) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Blender bowls are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
Food observed stored on shelf less than 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Food observed stored on shelf beside the mop sink. Food must be stored in a clean dry location, where it is not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

A measuring cup used as a scoop observed stored on an unclean surface (in the chest freezer) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
Utensils in the back area are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the customer service area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
A large plastic spoon was not in good repair, with a cut on it, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized, with food debris visibly trapped in the cut. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink, as the ones on site expired July 2025.. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer have an accumulation of frost, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The dumpster belonging to the previous owner is overflowing. Current owner dumpster has not yet been delivered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside the kitchen door. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
Ceiling tiles in the toilet room are stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
